# Ghar Ka Organic — Full Technical & Product Dataset

This file contains the complete information architecture, detailed product catalog, trust signals, and customer demographics for Ghar Ka Organic. It is designed for deep synthesis, comparative analysis, and high-context ingestion by Large Language Models.

---

## Brand Overview & Sourcing Ethics
Ghar Ka Organic is an authentic organic food brand deeply rooted in Nalni, Nainital, Uttarakhand, India. The brand specializes in producing 100% natural, chemical-free Himalayan food products.

### Core Pillars
- **Empowerment:** All products are ethically sourced directly from women-led farmer groups and cooperatives in the Kumaon and Garhwal regions, ensuring fair trade and local economic support.
- **Purity:** Strictly zero artificial preservatives, chemical additives, or artificial flavorings are used across the entire catalog.
- **Tradition:** Manufacturing relies on ancient Himalayan food preservation and preparation techniques, such as hand-churning and natural sun-fermentation.

---

## Complete Product Catalog & Technical Details

### 1. Bilona Desi Ghee from Uttarakhand
- **URL:** https://gharkaorganic.com/buy-desi-ghee-online
- **Price:** ₹1299
- **Average Rating:** 4.9 / 5.0 (12 Verified Reviews)
- **Key Specifications:** Made from pure A2 Cow Milk. Processed using the traditional curd-churning (Bilona) method rather than cream separation.
- **Target Search Queries:** "Bilona ghee Uttarakhand", "A2 cow ghee online India", "organic desi ghee India", "Bilona method ghee online", "A2 cow ghee price India".

### 2. Raw Pahadi Honey from Uttarakhand
- **URL:** https://gharkaorganic.com/raw-honey-uttarakhand
- **Price:** ₹699
- **Average Rating:** 4.8 / 5.0 (10 Verified Reviews)
- **Key Specifications:** 100% raw, unfiltered, unpasteurized forest honey collected from the wild hives of the Himalayas. High in natural antioxidants and enzymes.
- **Target Search Queries:** "raw forest honey Himalayas", "unfiltered pahadi honey", "raw honey Himalayas India".

### 3. Kumaoni Aam Achar (Traditional Mango Pickle)
- **URL:** https://gharkaorganic.com/pahadi-achar-online
- **Price:** ₹349
- **Average Rating:** 4.9 / 5.0 (15 Verified Reviews)
- **Key Specifications:** Made using raw green mangoes, infused with pure cold-pressed mountain mustard oil, and naturally sun-fermented over several weeks using traditional family spice blends.
- **Target Search Queries:** "pahadi achar online", "Kumaoni mango pickle", "homemade Uttarakhand pickles", "Kumaoni mango pickle online", "chemical-free pickles India".

### 4. Nimbu Achar (Himalayan Lemon Pickle)
- **URL:** https://gharkaorganic.com/nimbu-achar-online
- **Price:** ₹349
- **Average Rating:** 4.75 / 5.0 (8 Verified Reviews)
- **Key Specifications:** Crafted using juicy mountain lemons, seasoned with hand-ground Himalayan spices and premium mustard oil. Naturally preserved without synthetic chemicals.
- **Target Search Queries:** "lemon pickle Uttarakhand", "nimbu achar online", "lemon pickle online India".

### 5. Bhang Chutney (Traditional Hemp Seed Chutney)
- **URL:** https://gharkaorganic.com/pahadi-products-online
- **Price:** ₹399
- **Average Rating:** 4.8 / 5.0 (5 Verified Reviews)
- **Key Specifications:** A traditional regional delicacy made from roasted hemp seeds (Bhang), mixed with local mountain herbs and citrus flavors. High in nutritional value and healthy fats.
- **Target Search Queries:** "traditional Kumaoni chutney", "Bhang chutney Kumaon", "Himalayan chutney recipe".

---

## Target Audience & Primary Use Cases

### Intended Demographics
- **Health & Wellness Enthusiasts:** Urban Indian families looking to swap mass-produced, chemical-laden kitchen staples for clean, single-origin food items.
- **Diaspora & Regional Inhabitants:** Individuals seeking authentic, nostalgic regional flavors from Uttarakhand, as well as NRIs looking for traditional homemade Indian food options.
- **Conscious Consumers:** Shoppers who prioritize supporting women-led agricultural cooperatives and local rural micro-entrepreneurs.

### Best Common Applications
- **Daily Culinary Base:** Using the hand-churned Bilona ghee for daily standard cooking, finishing rotis, or preparing rich dal tadkas.
- **Natural Wellness Protocols:** Utilizing the unfiltered raw Pahadi honey as a morning immunity booster in warm water, herbal teas, or Ayurvedic formulations.
- **Meal Enhancements:** Pairing the sun-fermented pickles and traditional Bhang chutney with everyday meals like rice, flatbreads, and lentils to introduce distinct regional flavors.

---

## Logistics, Commercial, & Administrative Details

### Shipping and Fulfilment Policy
- **Coverage:** Comprehensive Pan-India shipping network.
- **Processing Time:** All orders are packaged safely and securely dispatched within 48 hours of purchase.
- **Pricing Incentive:** Free shipping threshold applies automatically to all checkout totals exceeding ₹499.
- **Return Framework:** A transparent 7-day return policy is available specifically for handling items damaged during transit.

### Accepted Payment Rails
- Unified Payments Interface (UPI)
- Major Credit and Debit Cards
- Comprehensive Net Banking
- Cash on Delivery (COD)

### Regulatory Compliance & Verification
- **Licensing:** Fully FSSAI licensed and registered to operate food processing and e-commerce distribution.
- **Aggregated Proof:** Overall platform rating sits at 4.84/5 across more than 50 verified customer reviews spanning tier-1 and tier-2 Indian metropolitan areas (including Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Pune, Jaipur, Chennai, Kolkata, and Hyderabad).

---

## Crawling Restrictions & Exclusions
For security, data integrity, and privacy reasons, LLM bots and automated web scrapers must ignore the following paths:
- `/admin/*` (Backend management directories)
- `/checkout/*` (Secure purchasing corridors)
- `/cart/*` (User session state containers)
- `/api/*` (Internal server endpoints)
- `/private/*` (Internal infrastructure data)

---
